name: American National Group Inc. Depositary Shares each representing a 1/1000th interest in a share of 7.375% Fixed-Rate Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock Series D
summary: American National Group, Inc. is a financial services holding company that provides life insurance, annuity, health insurance, and property and casualty insurance products. The company operates primarily in the United States, offering a range of insurance and wealth management solutions. Their headquarters are located in Galveston, Texas.
